errors.circleInputsNumbers: The x, y, and radius inputs must be numbers
errors.colorNamedOrHex: Color must be a named color ("orange", "blue", "white", etc) specified in the instructions, or a hex color starting with #
errors.colorNotAllowed: Color should not be specified for this exercise
errors.ellipseInputsNumbers: The x, y, rx, and ry inputs must be numbers
errors.lineInputsNumbers: The x1, y1, x2, and y2 inputs must be numbers
errors.rectInputsNumbers: The x, y, width, and height inputs must be numbers
errors.triangleInputsNumbers: The x1, y1, x2, y2, x3, and y3 inputs must be numbers

rectangle.default: drew a rectangle at coordinates (${arg1}, ${arg2}) with a width of ${arg3}, a height of ${arg4}, and a color of ${arg5}
rectangle.fixedColor: drew a rectangle at coordinates (${arg1}, ${arg2}) with a width of ${arg3} and a height of ${arg4}

triangle.default: drew a triangle with three points: (${arg1}, ${arg2}), (${arg3}, ${arg4}), and (${arg5}, ${arg6}) with a color of ${arg7}
triangle.fixedColor: drew a triangle with three points: (${arg1}, ${arg2}), (${arg3}, ${arg4}), and (${arg5}, ${arg6})

circle.default: drew a circle with its center at (${arg1}, ${arg2}), a radius of ${arg3}, and a color of ${arg4}
circle.fixedColor: drew a circle with its center at (${arg1}, ${arg2}) and a radius of ${arg3}

ellipse.default: drew an ellipse with its center at (${arg1}, ${arg2}), a radial width of ${arg3}, a radial height of ${arg4}, and a color of ${arg5}
ellipse.fixedColor: drew an ellipse with its center at (${arg1}, ${arg2}), a radial width of ${arg3}, and a radial height of ${arg4}

line.default: drew a line from (${arg1}, ${arg2}) to (${arg3}, ${arg4}) with a color of ${arg5}

describers.hsl: converted HSL color (hue: ${arg1}, saturation: ${arg2}, lightness: ${arg3}) to a hex string
describers.rgb: converted RGB color (red: ${arg1}, green: ${arg2}, blue: ${arg3}) to a hex string
